title: Part Feeding CalWiz Starting
description:
Part Feeding CalWiz Starting

Starting the Wizard

Click the <Calibration> button to open the dialog shown below.

If you are performing calibration for the first time, Part Area calibration is mandatory and Shift calibration is mandatory if a pick region other than Anywhere has been selected.

For subsequent calibrations, you can select specific items to calibrate for.

For more details, refer to Recalibrating the Feeder.

Note:  Flip & Separation Calibration is optional but recommended.  The auto-calibration attempts to find the optimal vibration parameters for the part.  If the calibration cannot successfully determine the correct vibration parameters, you will see the following Calibration Error -

When this error occurs, you will have to manually adjust the vibration parameters from the Calibration page.
